-- Roadbed.Logging :: schema upgrade — widen activity-id columns for UUIDv7
-- ============================================================================
-- Run this script with the target database already selected:
--     USE logging;
--     SOURCE upgrade_2026-06_uuidv7_widen_mysql.txt;
--
-- What this does
-- --------------
-- Widens every activity-id column in the Roadbed.Logging schema from
-- CHAR(26) to CHAR(36) so callers can pass a 36-character UUIDv7 string
-- generated by .NET's Guid.CreateVersion7(). Previous deployments sized
-- the columns for the old 26-character ULID; the portfolio is
-- standardizing on UUIDv7, and Roadbed.Logging is the last holdout.
--
-- Why CHAR(36) / ascii_bin is still correct
-- -----------------------------------------
-- UUIDv7's first 48 bits are a big-endian millisecond timestamp, so the
-- canonical 8-4-4-4-12 hex string sorts chronologically under
-- ascii_bin — the same "lexical order equals chronological order"
-- contract the column documented for ULID. NULL / NOT NULL semantics
-- are preserved exactly per column.
--
-- ALTER ... MODIFY rewrites the column metadata in place; the existing
-- PRIMARY KEY / KEY / partition definitions are left intact.
-- Partition pruning and composite-index shapes are unaffected because
-- only the column WIDTH changes, not the column NAME or POSITION.
--
-- Trace / span columns are intentionally NOT touched
-- --------------------------------------------------
-- trace_id (CHAR(32)) and span_id (CHAR(16)) are W3C trace/span hex,
-- not activity ids. They keep their existing widths.
--
-- Pre-launch data note
-- --------------------
-- This release ships pre-launch; the planning agent has confirmed any
-- existing dev-database `activity` / `activity_input` / `log_entries`
-- rows are disposable. Old 26-character ULID values are NOT
-- convertible to UUIDv7, so this script does not migrate row data.
-- Truncate or DELETE these tables before resuming writes if your dev
-- DB has pre-existing rows.

ALTER TABLE activity
     MODIFY id                    CHAR(36) CHARACTER SET ascii COLLATE ascii_bin NOT NULL
    ,MODIFY parent_activity_id    CHAR(36) CHARACTER SET ascii COLLATE ascii_bin NULL
    ,MODIFY root_activity_id      CHAR(36) CHARACTER SET ascii COLLATE ascii_bin NULL;

ALTER TABLE activity_input
     MODIFY activity_id           CHAR(36) CHARACTER SET ascii COLLATE ascii_bin NOT NULL
    ,MODIFY input_activity_id     CHAR(36) CHARACTER SET ascii COLLATE ascii_bin NOT NULL;

ALTER TABLE log_entries
     MODIFY activity_id           CHAR(36) CHARACTER SET ascii COLLATE ascii_bin NULL;
